basic_details.job_title: SGPGIMS Specialist Medical Officer Grade Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Sanjay Gandhi Post Graduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS)
basic_details.short_information: Sanjay Gandhi Post Graduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS) Specialist Medical Officer Grade II Notification 2026 has been released on 22 April 2026 on the official website www.sgpgims.org.in . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the SGPGIMS Specialist Medical Officer Grade II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years Relaxation for SC/ST/OBC as per UP Govt rules. 5 years for UP Govt employees with 3+ years service. Ex-serviceman: deduct military service from age, allowable up to 3 years over limit.

qualification.details: Recognized medical qualification (MBBS) as per Indian Medical Council Act/National Medical Commission Act-2019. Postgraduate Degree or Diploma in Anesthesia (Section-A or Section-B, Schedule-VI). Three years experience in Anesthesia after PG Diploma.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SGPGIMS Specialist Medical Officer Grade II Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.sgpgims.org.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SGPGIMS Specialist Medical Officer Gr.-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the SGPGIMS Specialist Medical Officer Gr.-II recruitment is 15-05-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Specialist Medical Officer Gr.-II post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Specialist Medical Officer Gr.-II post in the SGPGIMS recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a recognized university, a Postgraduate Degree or Diploma in Anesthesia, and have at least 3 years of experience in the specialty after their postgraduate qualification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Specialist Medical Officer Gr.-II post?
faq.answer: The age limit for this post is between 18 years and 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Uttar Pradesh Government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Specialist Medical Officer Gr.-II position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 67700 - 208700 Per Month, which is Level-11.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the SGPGIMS Specialist Medical Officer Gr.-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Specialist Medical Officer Gr.-II post will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the SGPGIMS official website. A direct link is usually provided in the 'Important Links' section of job portals or the official website itself.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of SGPGIMS?
faq.answer: The official website of Sanjay Gandhi Post Graduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS) is www.sgpgims.org.in.
